description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a predominantly black metal body and a wooden pistol grip. It features a cylindrical barrel with a perforated heat shield running along the top, and a prominent scope or optical sight mounted above the receiver. The shotgun has a short, robust profile, with a visible sling attachment and a thick, rounded trigger guard. The receiver and barrel assembly are detailed with mechanical components, including a bolt and ejection port. The overall design suggests a rugged, utilitarian weapon suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a black metal body, wooden grip, and mounted scope, featuring a perforated barrel shield and robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the wooden grip, mounted scope, and perforated barrel shield.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, scope alignment, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, scope, and mechanical details of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the scope mount, and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a perforated heat shield and short length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
